title: TGaceAllStories
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Why the U.S.’s ‘newfound oil’ in Venezuela won’t offset an Iran oil shock
items.description: Oil is still “baking in the mother of all supply shocks” since the 1973 oil embargo, says one energy-market investor.

items.title: My brother is paranoid, alone and has forgotten that he sold his house. How can we help?
items.description: His lawyer said, “He’s gone off the deep end.”

items.title: Why Broadcom’s earnings report has Wall Street so upbeat on a bad day for chip stocks
items.description: The chip maker said it has visibility into more than $100 billion in AI chip revenue in 2027, and some analysts see even more upside.

items.title: U.S. stocks swept up by growing fears of an oil shock

items.title: Some banks raised CD yields last month. Where you can still snag 4%
items.description: The rates give savers another opportunity to lock in sweet yields in the event the Federal Reserve resumes its rate cuts.

items.title: This stock got caught up in the software sell-off. Stephanie Link says it's the perfect time to buy

items.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.
